sources.title: Add source for discover_market_validation
sources.rationale: The opportunity and validation spine should start from current buyer urgency rather than internal narration alone.
search_queries: What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now
segment b2b product teams What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now
segment b2b product teams market validation ProductOS cannot credibly claim the next version until the repo turns messy notes and transcripts into a same-day, decision-ready PRD...
source_requirements: Look for current signals about buyer expectations, switching friction, and rollout proof requirements.
Use sources that help quantify whether the wedge feels urgent and credible.

sources.title: Add source for discover_competitor_research
sources.rationale: ProductOS should preserve a differentiated posture instead of collapsing into a generic workflow summary.
search_queries: How do current alternatives frame this workflow problem and where are their proof boundaries weaker
segment b2b product teams How do current alternatives frame this workflow problem and where are their proof boundaries weaker
segment b2b product teams competitor research ProductOS cannot credibly claim the next version until the repo turns messy notes and transcripts into a same-day, decision-ready P...
source_requirements: Prefer sources that state the competitor narrative, target buyer, and proof or pricing posture directly.
Use a fresh source when possible so the comparison reflects the current launch narrative.

sources.title: Add source for discover_customer_evidence
sources.rationale: Empathy synthesis should be grounded in reusable evidence before prioritization expands.
search_queries: What direct PM or operator evidence quantifies the manual reconstruction burden in this workflow
segment b2b product teams What direct PM or operator evidence quantifies the manual reconstruction burden in this workflow
segment b2b product teams customer evidence ProductOS cannot credibly claim the next version until the repo turns messy notes and transcripts into a same-day, decision-ready PRD...
source_requirements: Use first-hand operator or buyer evidence where the pain point is described directly.
Prefer a source newer than 90 days when using it for an external-facing release claim.
